title: Revenge Orbitals
description: revenge-orbitals is a orbital strike plugins for skripted servers
body:
This is a Orbital strike **stab/nuke/stasis** Plugin for skripted servers
AI

Orbital Strike: The Ultimate Tactical Support Plugin
Take control of the skies and bring devastation (or tactical control) to your Minecraft server with the Orbital Strike Skript! This powerful tool adds a high-tech, satellite-based weapon system to your gameplay, perfect for Factions, PvP, or Chaos servers.

Whether you want to annihilate a base, stop a runner in their tracks, or wipe out an entire army, this plugin provides the firepower you need.

Key Features:
The Nuclear Strike (Nuke): The ultimate weapon of mass destruction. Once triggered, an orbital laser charges up and delivers a massive explosion at the target location. It’s not just an explosion; it’s a statement. Perfect for raiding or endgame events.

The Stasis Beam: Tactics over brute force. The Stasis strike traps enemies in a localized time-warp. It freezes players or mobs in their tracks, making them vulnerable or stopping an escape. Ideal for bounty hunters and tactical team plays.

The Precision Stab: A concentrated, high-energy beam designed for single-target elimination. It strikes with surgical precision, dealing massive damage to a specific point without destroying the entire landscape like the Nuke.

Why Choose Orbital Strike?
Immersive Visuals: Designed to look like a real satellite strike with particle effects and sound cues that warn players before the impact.

Highly Customizable: Easily tweak damage values, explosion radii, and cooldowns within the Skript file to fit your server's balance.

Engaging Gameplay: Adds a new layer of strategy. Players must stay mobile to avoid being targeted by the "eye in the sky."

Lightweight Performance: Optimized for Skript-based servers to ensure that even a Nuke strike doesn't crash your TPS.
